items.title: 'Own it, don't trade it,' says Jim Cramer on Nvidia
items.description: CNBC’s Jim Cramer talks about the importance of stock picking for individual investors and breaks down what he thinks of Nvidia, Apple and Warner Bros. Discovery.

items.title: Jim Cramer rejects Wall Street doubts about Nvidia, Apple and Warner Bros. Discovery
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer on Tuesday told investors that it can be worthwhile to put trust in a good stock.

items.title: Apple (AAPL) Lands $330 Target as CLSA Turns More Bullish on iPhone Momentum
items.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) is one of the Must-Watch AI Stocks on Wall Street. On December 5, CLSA analyst Bhavtosh Vajpayee raised its price target on the stock to $330.00 from $265.00 while maintaining an “Outperform” rating. The firm noted how iPhone sales are “surging to new highs, with AI as a key unlock ahead of future […]

items.title: AT&T Joins T-Mobile In Digital Switching As Wireless Industry Faces Big Changes
items.description: AT&T will join T-Mobile in adopting digital switching for customers. The move is likely to increase industry customer turnover rates. AT&T stock dipped.
